articles.title: Finance Briefing: US Treasury Rout Tests Washington's Tolerance for Higher Borrowing Costs
articles.summary: A sharp rise in Treasury yields has rattled markets, raising questions about Washington’s willingness to tolerate higher borrowing costs.
